title: Full Room Re-Plaster
description: Complete strip-back and re-skim of a living room with damaged plaster. Walls left smooth and ready for decoration.

title: Artex Ceiling Removal
description: Removed old artex texture from the master bedroom ceiling and applied a fresh skim coat for a clean, modern finish.

title: Kitchen Repaint
description: Full kitchen repaint including walls, ceiling, and all woodwork. Two coats of durable eggshell for a lasting finish.

title: Hallway & Stairs Decorating
description: Wallpaper stripping, lining, and fresh paint throughout the hallway and staircase. Woodwork glossed to match.

title: Patch Plaster Repair
description: Repaired large areas of blown plaster in a period property bathroom, blending seamlessly with the surrounding walls.

title: Exterior Painting
description: Full exterior repaint of a semi-detached house including fascias, soffits, and window frames. Weather-resistant masonry paint applied.

title: New Build Plaster
description: First and second coat plastering throughout a new-build extension. Four rooms completed to a high standard in three days.

title: Feature Wall Wallpaper
description: Hung designer wallpaper on a living room feature wall with precise pattern matching and clean edges throughout.

title: Specialist Finishes
description: Bespoke textured finish on a feature wall with custom colour blending, creating a unique focal point for a modern living space.

title: Full House Exterior Repaint
description: Complete exterior repaint of a detached property including masonry walls, fascias, soffits and guttering. Weather-resistant finish throughout.

title: Garden Wall & Fence Painting
description: Preparation and painting of garden boundary walls and timber fencing. Durable exterior-grade paint for a clean, long-lasting result.

title: Front Door & Window Frames
description: Sanding, priming and repainting of a front door, window frames and sills. Fresh kerb appeal with a smooth, professional finish.
